INSERT INTO auxiliary."ServiceNFReport" (
  "ID", "RPS", "Nota", "Cliente", "CNPJ",
  "Endereco", "Numero", "Complemento", "Bairro", "Cidade",
  "Estado", "CEP", "Email", "Telefone", "Vendedor",
  "ValorServicos", "ValorTotal", "TotalParcelas", "ValorDeducoes", "Aliquota",
  "ValorISS", "ISSRetido", "ValorCOFINS", "ValorPIS", "ValorCSLL",
  "ValorIR", "ValorINSS", "ValorTributos", "DataPedido", "LocalPrestacao",
  "Contas", "Chave", "Protocolo", "Descricao", "DataEmissao",
  "Situacao", "DataCad", "DataMod",
  "created_at", "updated_at"
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.ID ? "'" + String($json.ID).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ String($json.RPS).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.Nota ? "'" + String($json.Nota).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Cliente ? "'" + String($json.Cliente).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.CNPJ ? "'" + String($json.CNPJ).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Endereco ? "'" + String($json.Endereco).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Numero ? "'" + String($json.Numero).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Complemento ? "'" + String($json.Complemento).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Bairro ? "'" + String($json.Bairro).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Cidade ? "'" + String($json.Cidade).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Estado ? "'" + String($json.Estado).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.CEP ? "'" + String($json.CEP).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Email ? "'" + String($json.Email).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Telefone ? "'" + String($json.Telefone).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Vendedor ? "'" + String($json.Vendedor).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorServicos ? "'" + String($json.ValorServicos).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorTotal ? "'" + String($json.ValorTotal).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.TotalParcelas ? "'" + String($json.TotalParcelas).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorDeducoes ? "'" + String($json.ValorDeducoes).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Aliquota ? "'" + String($json.Aliquota).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorISS ? "'" + String($json.ValorISS).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ISSRetido ? "'" + String($json.ISSRetido).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorCOFINS ? "'" + String($json.ValorCOFINS).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorPIS ? "'" + String($json.ValorPIS).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorCSLL ? "'" + String($json.ValorCSLL).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorIR ? "'" + String($json.ValorIR).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorINSS ? "'" + String($json.ValorINSS).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ValorTributos ? "'" + String($json.ValorTributos).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.DataPedido ? "'" + String($json.DataPedido).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.LocalPrestacao ? "'" + String($json.LocalPrestacao).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Contas ? "'" + String($json.Contas).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Chave ? "'" + String($json.Chave).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Protocolo ? "'" + String($json.Protocolo).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Descricao ? "'" + String($json.Descricao).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.DataEmissao ? "'" + String($json.DataEmissao).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.Situacao ? "'" + String($json.Situacao).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.DataCad ? "'" + String($json.DataCad).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.DataMod ? "'" + String($json.DataMod).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
)
ON CONFLICT ("RPS")
DO UPDATE SET
  "ID" = EXCLUDED."ID",
  "Nota" = EXCLUDED."Nota",
  "Cliente" = EXCLUDED."Cliente",
  "CNPJ" = EXCLUDED."CNPJ",
  "Endereco" = EXCLUDED."Endereco",
  "Numero" = EXCLUDED."Numero",
  "Complemento" = EXCLUDED."Complemento",
  "Bairro" = EXCLUDED."Bairro",
  "Cidade" = EXCLUDED."Cidade",
  "Estado" = EXCLUDED."Estado",
  "CEP" = EXCLUDED."CEP",
  "Email" = EXCLUDED."Email",
  "Telefone" = EXCLUDED."Telefone",
  "Vendedor" = EXCLUDED."Vendedor",
  "ValorServicos" = EXCLUDED."ValorServicos",
  "ValorTotal" = EXCLUDED."ValorTotal",
  "TotalParcelas" = EXCLUDED."TotalParcelas",
  "ValorDeducoes" = EXCLUDED."ValorDeducoes",
  "Aliquota" = EXCLUDED."Aliquota",
  "ValorISS" = EXCLUDED."ValorISS",
  "ISSRetido" = EXCLUDED."ISSRetido",
  "ValorCOFINS" = EXCLUDED."ValorCOFINS",
  "ValorPIS" = EXCLUDED."ValorPIS",
  "ValorCSLL" = EXCLUDED."ValorCSLL",
  "ValorIR" = EXCLUDED."ValorIR",
  "ValorINSS" = EXCLUDED."ValorINSS",
  "ValorTributos" = EXCLUDED."ValorTributos",
  "DataPedido" = EXCLUDED."DataPedido",
  "LocalPrestacao" = EXCLUDED."LocalPrestacao",
  "Contas" = EXCLUDED."Contas",
  "Chave" = EXCLUDED."Chave",
  "Protocolo" = EXCLUDED."Protocolo",
  "Descricao" = EXCLUDED."Descricao",
  "DataEmissao" = EXCLUDED."DataEmissao",
  "Situacao" = EXCLUDED."Situacao",
  "DataCad" = EXCLUDED."DataCad",
  "DataMod" = EXCLUDED."DataMod",
  "updated_at" = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
RETURNING "RPS";

INSERT INTO auxiliary."NF_ServiceMetadata" (
  "codigo",
  "numeronfs",
  "created_at",
  "updated_at"
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.codigo }}',
  '{{ $json.numeronfs }}',
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
)
ON CONFLICT ("codigo")
DO UPDATE SET
  "numeronfs" = EXCLUDED."numeronfs",
  "updated_at" = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."numeronfs" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."numeronfs"
RETURNING "codigo", "numeronfs", "cliente", "status";
